rule: 每个素材概念至少提供 classic_pixel、paper_archive、rainy_scanline 三种可选择风格；未选中的候选继续隔离，不接入运行时。

classic_pixel.description: 16-bit strict top-down/cardinal pixel art, crisp tile grid, restrained campus palette, readable silhouettes, no perspective drift, no text
classic_pixel.use: 地图、场景和角色的默认基准

paper_archive.description: two-tone campus archive print, paper grain, risograph blocks, navy ink and warm ivory paper, flat orthographic/cardinal composition, clean blank areas, no readable text
paper_archive.use: 纸质道具、调查证据和可读界面的备选

rainy_scanline.description: dark navy and cyan CRT scanline pixel art, restrained yellow evidence accents, rainy university morning atmosphere, high contrast but legible, orthographic/cardinal composition, no readable text
rainy_scanline.use: 雨天、系统界面和悬疑场景的备选

classic_pixel.description: compact 16-bit chiptune, square-wave pulse, crisp menu ticks, short loop, no vocals

paper_ambient.description: quiet analog campus ambience, muted electric piano, brushed percussion, paper and clock textures, restrained mystery, no vocals

rainy_glitch.description: dark rainy CRT electronica, cyan glitch pulses, low sub bass, sparse radio noise, controlled tension, no vocals

baseline.description: clear English game dialogue, natural pauses, preserve the assigned character role

low_deadpan.description: slower delivery, dry deadpan pauses, understated irony, never theatrical

clipped_comic.description: slightly brisk delivery, clipped phrases, restrained comic timing, never excited

clean_ui.description: clean dry pixel UI sound, short transient, readable confirmation, no melody

paper_mechanical.description: paper texture, small mechanical click, warm room resonance, short and usable

radio_glitch.description: narrow radio shimmer, low pulse, restrained digital glitch, short and usable

plain_case.delivery: 保持原文事实和句式，适合纸质证据、帖子正文和调查记录。
plain_case.selection: 信息密度优先，避免额外情绪。

dry_campus.delivery: 保持事实不变，允许短句停顿、克制吐槽和校园论坛口吻；不提前公布答案。
dry_campus.selection: 适合男旁白、普通回复、操作反馈和剧情过场。

procedural_minimal.delivery: 将同一信息压缩为可放进任务栏或系统提示的短句，优先动作、对象和状态。
procedural_minimal.selection: 适合任务键、进度栏、错误反馈和无障碍描述。
